title: Cook Configuration
description: Configuration file for cook, a build automation tool.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the cook JSON schema.

global.description: Global configuration shared across all tasks.

env_file.description: List of additional .env files to load.

environment.description: Environment variables available to all tasks. Values support $(command) substitution.

events.description: Lifecycle hooks that run around tasks and commands.

before_each_run.description: Commands to run before each command in a task.

after_each_run.description: Commands to run after each command in a task.

before_each_task.description: Commands to run before each task starts.

after_each_task.description: Commands to run after each task completes.

task.description: A named task containing commands to execute.

files.description: File glob patterns to watch. Use {FILES} in run commands to reference expanded paths.

run.description: Commands to execute. Supports ${VAR} environment variables and $(command) substitution.

depends_on.description: Tasks that must complete before this task runs. Dependencies run in parallel when possible.
